productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Grey track pants for women made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has flattened seams, reinforced tear points, a broad elasticated waistband, blue panelling below the waistband, stitch detailing and brand logo embroidered on the left leg Fit Regular Wash Care Wash dark colours separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or iron Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in these urban yoga pants. Made of a soft cotton/lycra blend, it's stitched with flat seams to prevent irritation allowing you to concentrate on your yoga in peace. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. Team this with urban yoga t-shirts and tops for the ultimate in comfort. Model Statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'9" and waist 26"
